design_philosophy: Raw, anonymous, and brutalist. 'No selfies, no followers, no bullshit'. Strip away all unnecessary decorations. Rely on stark typography, pure blacks, high-contrast whites, and exposed grid layouts to convey a sense of underground authenticity. The aesthetic is text-forward, highly legible, and cinematic.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing on landing/marketing sections (p-12 to p-24). Dense, control-room grid for the chat interface and queues. Exact padding and margins.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical grid for user profiles. Polaroids act as the primary content blocks spanning various row heights.

polaroid_card.description: A digital representation of a conversation snapshot acting as user profile content.
polaroid_card.styles: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 p-4 pb-14 shadow-2xl relative transition-transform hover:-translate-y-2 hover:border-white/30 rounded-sm
polaroid_card.inner_content: A visual snapshot of text (simulated chat log) on a darker #000 background inside the card.

chat_interface.styles: No standard bloated chat bubbles. Messages from others are left-aligned with a 2px border-l border-white/20 pl-4 py-1. User messages are right-aligned, text-secondary.
chat_interface.input: border-t border-white/10 bg-transparent p-6 w-full outline-none focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 font-mono text-sm

queue_matching.visual: Pure black screen. 3 small glowing accent-colored (#FF3B30) dots pulsating using framer-motion. Text 'Searching for connection...' in IBM Plex Mono.

forms.styles: Use Shadcn customized: flat borders, rounded-none, bg-transparent. Focus states turn the border pure white. Large text inputs.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-none w-full sm:w-auto
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white bg-transparent hover:bg-white/5 px-8 py-4 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest

navigation_tab_bar.styles: bg-[#050505]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 text-zinc-500 flex justify-around p-4

animations.general: Fast, purposeful micro-interactions. No bouncy or playful physics.
animations.hover: Subtle brightness increase or sharp 1px border reveal.
animations.queue: Rhythmic pulsing (opacity 0.2 to 1) for loading dots.

image_urls.description: Film grain texture for overlays on the dark mode background to give a raw, analog feel. Apply as a mix-blend-overlay or low opacity absolute background.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming convention (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply a dark theme globally by setting the root body background to #050505 and foreground to #FFFFFF.
Ensure the application strictly uses .js/.jsx extensions (React), not TypeScript (.tsx).
Implement the landing page with extreme minimalism: massive typography, pure black void, and a prominent 'Just Talk' CTA.
Use framer-motion for the queue dots animation, and keep it extremely stark.
The Polaroid element is a stylized div (not an image). Construct it with a light/grey border, dark surface, extra bottom padding, and inject a chat snippet inside. This acts as the user profile grid.
For icons, use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone or regular weights.
Override default Shadcn components to remove roundness (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to fit the brutalist aesthetic.
